blocks.text: Cameron Young seizes THE PLAYERS — Hovland's challenge fades at TPC Sawgrass

Liverpool drop two more crucial points — now 21 behind Arsenal, the title race is over. A club legend's verdict on the Spurs draw: 'Fullstendig sjokkerende.' Wednesday brings Galatasaray and a must-win at Anfield.
⚽ Tue 18:45 — Bodø/Glimt at Sporting CP: winner-takes-all CL second leg, historic Norwegian night in Lisbon

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League Tuesday
items: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen — 21:00, all-square, league leaders defend the Emirates
Man City vs Real Madrid — 21:00, perfectly poised, one of football's great rivalries
Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain — 21:00, nothing separating them at Stamford Bridge
